digest_text: Hacker News is buzzing right now - 3.4 posts/minute, well above the norm, with an active volume spike (15 posts vs. a 3.8 rolling average). Sentiment is running slightly negative overall, but the top story, "Bitcoin hits all time high as institutional adoption grows" (298 pts, 149 comments), is driving most of the traffic. A drift score of 0.45 suggests the conversation is pivoting away from AI/tooling discussion toward crypto and finance.
